app.title: SuperPicky - AI Bird Photo Culling Tool v{version} ({hash})
app.window_title: SuperPicky - AI Bird Photo Culling Tool

menu.background_mode_msg:
App will enter background mode

• Bird ID service continues running
• Lightroom plugin works normally
• Reopen app to restore interface

Note: Server uses ~250MB memory

labels.subtitle: AI Bird Photo Culling Tool
labels.dir_placeholder: 📁 Drop folder here or click to select...
labels.support_format_hint: Supports RAW / JPG · Drag folder or click to browse

dialogs.file_organization_msg:
After analysis, photos will be organized into folders:

• 3-Star → 3_star_excellent
• 2-Star → 2_star_good
• 1-Star → 1_star_average
• Rejects/No Bird → 0_star_reject
{extra_notes}
Use 'Reset' to restore original structure if needed.
dialogs.note_flight: 🟢 BIF (Flying) photos will get green label (Sharpness x1.2)
dialogs.note_birdid: 🐦 2-Star+ photos will auto-identify bird species and write to EXIF Title
dialogs.note_burst: 📸 Smart Burst: Merged to highest-rated photo's folder (Min 4 photos)

SuperPicky culling records detected in this folder.

Do you want to enter [Re-Cull] mode directly to adjust ratings?
(Select 'No' to stay on main screen and restart culling)
messages.history_reset_msg:
SuperPicky culling records detected in this folder.

Do you want to [Reset Folder] and clear history data?
(Select 'No' to keep existing ratings)
messages.dir_unavailable: Folder unavailable. Please make sure the external drive is connected.

post_adjustment.title: Post Adjustment - Optimize Rating Criteria
post_adjustment.tip_lightroom: Tip: Use 'Read Metadata from Files' in Lightroom to sync.
post_adjustment.description: 📊 Based on existing AI analysis, quickly adjust rating criteria (no need to re-run AI)
post_adjustment.threshold_description: Drag sliders to adjust thresholds and preview changes in real-time
post_adjustment.advanced_tip: Values below these will be rated as 0 Star
post_adjustment.picked_note: Among 3-star photos, those ranking top in both aesthetic and sharpness will be flagged
post_adjustment.apply_confirm_msg:
Apply new rating criteria?

Will update {count} photos' ratings and pick flags.

settings.thresholds_desc: Minimum thresholds for technical quality. Photos below these values get 0 stars.
settings.reset_confirm_msg: Reset all settings to default values?
settings.reset_done_msg: All settings have been reset to defaults.
settings.save_success_msg:
Settings saved successfully.
Language changes require restart.
settings.exposure_desc: Photos with overexposed/underexposed ratio above this threshold will be downgraded by 1 star

advanced_settings.title: Settings
advanced_settings.apps_hint: Added apps appear as 'Open in X' in the thumbnail right-click menu.
advanced_settings.detection_sensitivity_hint: Lower = More sensitive, easier to detect birds
advanced_settings.sharpness_requirement_hint: Higher = Stricter, keeps only the sharpest photos
advanced_settings.aesthetics_requirement_hint: Higher = Stricter, keeps only well-composed photos
advanced_settings.birdid_confidence_hint: Higher = More accurate, but may miss some species
advanced_settings.xmp_write_hint: When checked: write XMP sidecar only, do not modify RAW; when unchecked: write directly to ARW
advanced_settings.xmp_mode_embedded_hint: Write directly to ARW/CR3 raw files
advanced_settings.xmp_mode_sidecar_hint: Create separate .xmp file, preserve original RAW
advanced_settings.burst_fps_hint: Continuous shots faster than this will be grouped together
advanced_settings.confirm_reset_msg: Reset all settings to default values?
advanced_settings.reset_done_msg: All settings have been reset to defaults.
advanced_settings.save_error_msg: Failed to save settings. Please check permissions.
advanced_settings.rating_tab_description: Adjust hardcoded rating thresholds (affects 'Rejects' judgment, -1 star only for no bird)
advanced_settings.output_tab_description: Configure output and logging related settings
advanced_settings.min_confidence_description: Below this value will be Unrated (poor technical quality)
advanced_settings.min_sharpness_description: Below this value will be Unrated (poor technical quality)
advanced_settings.min_nima_description: Below this value will be Unrated (poor technical quality)
advanced_settings.max_brisque_description: Above this value will be Unrated (poor technical quality)
advanced_settings.picked_percentage_description: Among 3-star photos, those ranking in top % for both aesthetic and sharpness will be picked
advanced_settings.csv_description: CSV contains detailed rating data for all photos (required for Re-Cull feature)
advanced_settings.log_detailed_label: Detailed - Show rating details for each photo
advanced_settings.log_simple_label: Simple - Only show progress and statistics
advanced_settings.keep_preview_hint: Retain AI crop previews and temp files (cache/debug_crops)
advanced_settings.name_format_hint: Choose which English naming standard to use for bird species

tooltips.ai_confidence: AI bird detection confidence threshold, photos below this won't be processed
tooltips.sharpness: Photo sharpness threshold, affects 2-star and 3-star ratings
tooltips.nima: NIMA aesthetic score threshold, affects 2-star and 3-star ratings
tooltips.normalization: Sharpness normalization method, affects fairness between large and small birds

help.welcome_title: Welcome to SuperPicky V{version} - AI Bird Photo Culling Tool
help.step1: Click 'Browse' to select source folder (supports RAW/JPG)
help.step2: Adjust 3-star and pick parameters (optional, defaults recommended)
help.step3: Click 'Start Culling' and wait for AI analysis to complete
help.step4: Import to Lightroom for post-processing and management
help.rule_3_star: ⭐⭐⭐ = Both sharpness and aesthetics meet threshold (3 stars)
help.rule_picked: └─ 🏆 Pick (Flag) = Top {percentage}% in both aesthetics and sharpness among 3-star photos
help.rule_flying: 🟢 Green Label = Bird in Flight (BIF) (Sharpness ×1.2 bonus)
help.rule_focus: 🔴 Red Label = Critical Focus (focus on head) (Sharpness ×1.1 bonus)
help.burst_info: 📸 Smart Burst: Merged to highest-rated photo's folder (Min 4 photos)
help.rule_2_star: ⭐⭐ = Either sharpness or aesthetics meets threshold (2 stars)
help.rule_1_star: ⭐ = Bird detected but below threshold (1 star)
help.rule_0_star: Unrated (Rejects) = Poor technical quality (confidence/aesthetics/sharpness below threshold or both eyes hidden)
help.ready: Ready? Select a folder to begin!
help.tool_1: SuperPicky: AI Bird Photo Culling Tool
help.tool_2: Bird Identifier: AI bird species recognition (Mac/Win Lightroom plugin)
help.tool_3: Bird Finder: eBird information retrieval tool (Web beta)
help.tool_4: Star Remover: AI Milky Way star removal (Mac Photoshop plugin)
help.tool_5: Tui Portfolio: iOS bird species statistics app
help.tool_6: Travel Diary: AI travel journal writing assistant (iOS)

lightroom_guide.title: Lightroom Classic User Guide - How to View and Use SuperPicky Ratings
lightroom_guide.method1_step1: Open Lightroom Classic → Click 'File' → 'Import Photos and Video'
lightroom_guide.method1_step3: Photos will automatically have star ratings and pick flags!
lightroom_guide.method1_step4: ⚠️ Important: After import, select all photos (including subfolders) → Menu 'Metadata' → 'Read Metadata from Files'
lightroom_guide.method1_step5: Only after the previous step, pick/reject flags will display correctly, otherwise only ratings and color labels show
lightroom_guide.method2_title: Method 2: Re-read Metadata from Already Imported Photos
lightroom_guide.method2_intro: If photos are already in Lightroom, re-read EXIF ratings:
lightroom_guide.method2_step1: Select all processed photos in Library (Cmd+A / Ctrl+A)
lightroom_guide.method2_step3: Confirm → Star ratings and pick flags will auto-update!
lightroom_guide.filter_method2_step2: Click '🏆Pick' flag → Show only picked photos
lightroom_guide.sort_step3_city: ☑ City (Head sharpness value - higher is sharper)
lightroom_guide.sort_step4: Click sort by (e.g., click 'City' to sort by sharpness)
lightroom_guide.field_rating: Rating: -1 star (rejected) / 0 star (poor quality) / 1 star / 2 stars / 3 stars (excellent)
lightroom_guide.field_pick: Pick: 🏆Picked (top 25% in both aesthetics & sharpness among 3-star) / 🚫Rejected (-1 star)
lightroom_guide.field_city: City: Head sharpness value, range 0-2000+, higher is sharper
lightroom_guide.field_state: Province-State: Aesthetic score, range 0-10, higher matches human aesthetics better
lightroom_guide.field_caption: Caption: Detailed rating logic explanation, including sharpness, aesthetics, focus status analysis
lightroom_guide.workflow_step1: Step 1: Filter 3-star + picked photos → These are the best quality
lightroom_guide.workflow_step2: Step 2: Sort by 'City' descending → View sharpest photos
lightroom_guide.debug_tip: In the photo directory's hidden folder .superpicky/debug_crops/, you can find AI analysis diagrams for each photo:
lightroom_guide.debug_explain1: 🟢 Green area = Detected bird body outline (SEG mask)
lightroom_guide.debug_explain3: 🔴 Red cross = Focus point position from RAW file
lightroom_guide.bridge_tip: 💡 Simplest: Use Bridge to open different star folders (3星_优选/, 2星_良好/, etc.)

report.title: Processing Statistics Report
report.picked_detail: 🏆 Picked (top in both aesthetics & sharpness): {count} ({percent:.1f}% of 3-star)
report.tip_high_no_bird: 😅 High number of empty frames... Consider adjusting shooting angle or using a longer lens
report.tip_no_excellent: 😢 No excellent photos this time... Don't be discouraged, bird photography requires patience and luck!
report.tip_high_excellent: 🎉 Excellent photos exceed 50%! Great shooting quality!

update.title: Update Available
update.download_hint: To download, visit the official website:
update.include_prerelease: Notify me about pre-release versions (Beta / RC)
update.patch_restart_hint: A patch has been applied in the background. Restart the app to take effect.
update.update_center_result_patch_applied: 🔧 Patch applied, restart to take effect

repair.summary: Check and repair the private Python runtime, Torch, models, and database resources required by the current installation. This does not rerun first-launch preferences.

about.subtitle: AI Bird Photo Culling Tool
about.content:
James Yu
Australian-Chinese Professional Photographer, Author of "James' Landscape Photography Notes" Trilogy

Model Training: Jordan Yu
Development Team: Xiaoping, Lyapunov, osk.sh

Open Source Models
YOLO11 - Bird Detection by Ultralytics
OSEA - Bird Classification by Sun Jiao
TOPIQ - Aesthetic Scoring by Chaofeng Chen et al.

License: GPL-3.0
© 2024-2025 James Yu

birdid.drag_hint:
Drop image here

Would you like to select now?

Drop bird photo here
Results will appear here

cli.banner: 🐦 SuperPicky CLI v{version} - AI Photo Selector (Command Line)
cli.birdid_banner: 🐦 BirdID CLI - AI Species Recognition (Command Line)
cli.preview_hint: 💡 Preview mode. No changes made. Add --execute to process.
cli.no_bird_hint: 💡 Tip: try lowering detection sensitivity or retake the photo
cli.sp_description: SuperPicky CLI - Photo organizer, re-rating and burst detection
cli.bid_description: BirdID CLI - Standalone bird identification and EXIF writer

skill_level.dialog_hint: You can change this anytime in Settings, or customize thresholds

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Finish setup in three quick steps and start culling.
onboarding.welcome_feature_title: A smoother default workflow for bird photographers
onboarding.welcome_feature_desc: We'll set your update preference and photography level now, and you can change both later in Settings.
onboarding.lite_welcome_subtitle: The lightweight build will prepare its runtime, models, and databases on first launch.
onboarding.lite_welcome_hint: You only need to confirm your preferences. The rest of the setup will run automatically.
onboarding.update_subtitle: If you turn this off, initialization will also skip automatic patch and component update checks.
onboarding.update_enabled_desc: Initialization can check patches now, and later startup can check automatically too
onboarding.update_disabled_desc: Neither initialization nor normal startup will check automatically
onboarding.update_hint: You can change this later in the Update Center.
onboarding.skill_subtitle: This applies a recommended threshold preset first. You can still adjust it later in Settings.
onboarding.skill_hint: For the first run, the default recommendation is usually the safest choice.
onboarding.features_subtitle: Initialization will automatically install the following AI models and database resources. No manual selection is required.
onboarding.features_hint: Windows Lite keeps its runtime under the app installation directory. macOS Lite uses the bundled runtime.
onboarding.feature_core_detection_label: Core culling  -  Install the main detection model and base classification capability
onboarding.feature_quality_label: Aesthetic scoring  -  Download the TOPIQ quality model
onboarding.feature_keypoint_label: Keypoint detection  -  Download the keypoint model for finer detail checks
onboarding.feature_flight_label: Flight detection  -  Download the flight recognition model
onboarding.feature_birdid_label: Bird identification  -  Download Bird ID databases and related resources
onboarding.model_core_detection_desc: Installs the main detection model and base classification capability used to find birds and run the core culling flow.
onboarding.model_quality_desc: Installs the TOPIQ quality model used to assess the overall visual quality and aesthetic appeal of photos.
onboarding.model_keypoint_desc: Installs the keypoint model used to analyze bird details and important body landmarks for finer judgments.
onboarding.model_flight_desc: Installs the flight recognition model used to detect flying poses and support flight-specific culling behavior.
onboarding.model_birdid_desc: Installs Bird ID databases and related resources used for species identification and metadata assistance later.
onboarding.runtime_status_hint: If the runtime check does not pass, initialization will repair the missing runtime automatically.
onboarding.runtime_status_item_pending: ✅ Runtime will be completed during initialization
onboarding.runtime_status_policy_windows: ✅ Windows Lite installs its runtime into _internal/runtime_env under the app installation directory
onboarding.runtime_status_policy_mac: ✅ macOS Lite uses the runtime bundled with the app and does not download it separately
onboarding.runtime_hint_cpu: CPU runtime will be installed automatically.
onboarding.runtime_hint_cuda: CUDA support was detected. Initialization will prefer the CUDA runtime.
onboarding.runtime_hint_mac: This is macOS. The Lite build will use the bundled runtime directly.
onboarding.initialization_interrupted: Initialization was interrupted. The next launch will try to repair the environment automatically.
onboarding.close_confirm_message: Exiting now will interrupt initialization. On the next launch, SuperPicky will clean up leftovers and try to repair the environment automatically.

browser.title: Selection Results Browser
browser.no_db_hint: Please run SuperPicky on a photo directory first.
browser.delete_msg:
Move {filename} to Trash?

❗ This will also delete the database record. You'll need to reprocess after restoring.
browser.delete_failed_msg:
Failed to move file to Trash:
{error}
